warnings: Several upstream handoffs have warning status; the report treats them as usable with explicit caveats.
The final conclusion is conditional positive evidence for PTA spectral compatibility, not a completed cosmological viability proof.
No non-PTA published constraint was applied as an exclusion by the constraints handoff.
The DBF template was used as the closest supported template, but its validity is warning-level for the strongest supercooled points.
The PTArcade MAP point is on the physical y_D=0 boundary.
The rectangular 68% posterior region contains beta_lambda<0 corners; a masked posterior summary is still required.
LaTeX compilation succeeded with nonfatal overfull/underfull box warnings in tables and display math.
approximations: Report content is derived from upstream handoff JSONs and does not add new physics calculations.
Mass-region summaries use handoff-provided rectangular posterior bounds rather than posterior-covariance masking.
Citation verification follows upstream citation_verified metadata; arXiv:1205.2893 is marked uncertain and not used for an exclusion claim.

included_sections.name: Summary
notes: Answers the original NANOGrav/FOPT question conditionally.

included_sections.name: Model
notes: Includes gauge group, fields, charges, Lagrangian terms, parameters, and field-dependent masses.

included_sections.name: Literature Context
notes: Includes verified literature findings and novelty verdict.

included_sections.name: FOPT Results
notes: Includes scan counts, representative points, and backend caveats.

included_sections.name: PTA and PTArcade Results
notes: Includes 14/14 benchmark result, posterior/MAP estimates, and DBF template warning.

included_sections.name: Constraints
notes: Includes non-exclusion status and missing backend calculations.

included_sections.name: Prior and Assumption Audit
notes: Includes highest-severity uncontrolled issues and required followups.

included_sections.name: Conclusion
notes: Distinguishes conditional positive evidence from unresolved cosmology, template, and portal caveats.

included_sections.name: References
notes: Uncertain citation is marked explicitly and not used as an exclusion.
